## What

One sentence: what does this PR change?

## Why

Why was this change needed?

## Testing

- [ ] TypeScript compiles with zero errors
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Tested on desktop (hover)
- [ ] Tested on mobile (touch)
- [ ] Animations respect `prefers-reduced-motion`

## Documentation

- [ ] Architecture doc updated if needed
- [ ] ADR written if a significant decision was made
- [ ] N/A

## Screenshots

_If this is a visual change, add a screenshot or recording._
